title: ZXSnake Overview
description: An introduction to ZXSnake, its core loop, and how the game connects to the ZX Series.
summary: ZXSnake is a ZX Spectrum-inspired arcade snake title with solo, AI, and multiplayer play across the ZX Series ecosystem.
sourceNotes: Derived from pages/apps/zxsnake.json and confirmed overview assets.
Feature-specific implementation details should match final release play logs for exact balance values.

sections.heading: What is ZXSnake?
paragraphs: ZXSnake is the flagship title in the ZX Series and keeps classic snake gameplay simple, fast, and replayable.
The game combines solo and competitive match options with shared progression features used across the series.

sections.heading: How this guide is organised
paragraphs: Start with How to Play, then move through Controls and Game Modes before reading the progression pages.
Use Guide navigation on each page to move between sections quickly.

sections.heading: Series context
paragraphs: ZXSnake supports shared achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins as part of the wider ZX Series.
This allows players to carry expectations across supported titles without changing conventions when moving between games.
